## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` is green
- [ ] If `engine/`, `dom/`, or `build/` changed, I ran `npm run build` and committed `dist/`
- [ ] For a DOM/CSS change, I verified in a real browser (`dev/fixture/`)
- [ ] Behaviour change → `CHANGELOG.md` updated (and `package.json` version if releasing)
- [ ] No text is mutated; visual-only flips keep copy/Ctrl-F byte-for-byte
